title: Smoky Crisp Spanish Passionfruit Salad
description: A fresh, herbal salad with a smoky kick, featuring juicy passion fruit pulp and crisp mixed greens-lowcarb, light, and perfect for a quick lunch.

ingredients.name: sea salt
ingredients.notes: use ¼ tsp for dressing, ¼ tsp for seasoning

instructions: Rinse and dry the mixed greens, then place in a large bowl.
Whisk together passion fruit pulp, lime zest, lime juice, smoked paprika, and ¼ tsp salt until smooth.
Drizzle olive oil over the greens and toss to coat lightly.
Add the chopped mixed herbs and toss again to distribute the flavors.
Pour the passionfruit dressing over the greens and gently toss until the salad is coated.
Season with the remaining ¼ tsp salt and ¼ tsp pepper, adjusting to taste.
Serve immediately; optionally garnish with toasted pumpkin seeds for extra crunch.
For a deeper smoky flavor, lightly smoke the salad in a kitchen smoker or with a smoke infuser for 2–3 minutes before serving.
